name: Louis Vuitton
description: French fashion house renowned for its iconic monogram canvas and timeless travel heritage since 1854.

name: Chanel
description: Synonymous with timeless elegance, Chanel defines Parisian luxury with the iconic 2.55 and Classic Flap.

name: Dior
description: Christian Dior's vision of refined femininity, crafting the legendary Lady Dior and Saddle bags.

name: Hermes
description: The pinnacle of artisanal leather goods, famed for the Birkin, Kelly, and unparalleled craftsmanship.

name: Gucci
description: Italian maximalism meets heritage craftsmanship, home to the Horsebit, Dionysus, and Marmont.

name: YSL
description: Saint Laurent's edgy Parisian-chic, defining modern luxury with the Loulou, Kate, and Niki.

name: Prada
description: Miuccia Prada's intellectual luxury, blending nylon innovation with refined Italian leather goods.

name: Bottega Veneta
description: Master of intrecciato woven leather, understated luxury with the Cassette and Jodie.

name: Celine
description: Phoebe Philo and Hedi Slimane's minimalist vision of modern French elegance.

name: Goyard
description: The most discreet of luxury houses, hand-painted chevron canvas since 1853.

name: Loewe
description: Jonathan Anderson's craft revival, blending Spanish leather heritage with modern artistry.

name: Balenciaga
description: Cristobal Balenciaga's architectural heritage reimagined for the streetwear age.

name: MiuMiu
description: Playful, rebellious sister to Prada, defining youthful luxury.

name: Fendi
description: Roman luxury with the iconic Baguette and Peekaboo, defined by Karl Lagerfeld's vision.

name: Burberry
description: British heritage icon, the quintessential trench coat house with the iconic check.

name: Loro Piana
description: The world's finest cashmere and vicuna, Italian quiet luxury at its peak.

name: Givenchy
description: Hubert de Givenchy's aristocratic elegance, beloved by Audrey Hepburn.
